overall_justification: This edition focuses heavily on the positive reactions to the Convênio de Taubaté's approval in the Câmara Federal.  The numerous congratulatory telegrams, prominently displayed on the front page, strongly signal the newspaper's support for the Convênio and, by extension, the creation of the Caixa de Conversão as a crucial mechanism for valorization.  While the edition also includes routine market and shipping news, these do not detract from the overwhelming emphasis on celebrating the Convênio's advancement, a key component of the expansionist agenda.

supporting_evidence.quote: Cachoeira. —Em nome da Cama ra Municipal e do povo do muni cipio de Bocaina, congratulo-me com v. exa. pela victoria da valorização do café na Câmara Fe deral. — João Antonio Oliveira Porto, presidente.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This congratulatory telegram, among many others featured prominently on the front page, highlights the widespread support for the valorization scheme and the Convênio, which is intrinsically linked to the establishment of the Caixa de Conversão.  It sets the overall tone of the edition as celebratory and pro-valorization.

supporting_evidence.quote: Taubaté. — Approvação quasi unanime do Convênio de Taubaté glorifica os seus esforços patrio ticos. Vivas congratulação.— Vigário de Taubaté.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: Coming from Taubaté, the namesake of the Convênio, this telegram carries extra weight. The "quasi unanime" approval and the emphasis on "esforços patrioticos" further reinforce the positive framing of the Convênio and its connection to the broader expansionist goals.

supporting_evidence.quote: Mogy-mirim.—Felicitações si nceras pela approvação da Câmara ao Convênio de Taubaté, do qual v. exa. é o principal propugnador.— João Jorge Siqueira Franco, Fran cisco Ferreira Alves, João Thomas Palhares, directorio provisório do partido.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This telegram explicitly identifies the president of the state as the "principal propugnador" (main proponent) of the Convênio. By publishing this, the newspaper signals its alignment with the president's expansionist policies and celebrates his success in advancing the Convênio.
